_meta.description: Template for recurring annual events - copy and update dates each year
_meta.instructions: 1. Copy events from this file to events.json, 2. Update year in dates (e.g., 2026 → 2027), 3. Verify dates fall on open days (Wed-Sat), 4. Add any new one-off events
_meta.usage: Annual copy-paste template, saves 15+ minutes each year

instructions.step1: For each event below, update the year in the date field
instructions.step3: Verify the resulting date is a Wed, Thu, Fri, or Sat
instructions.step4: Check the event doesn't fall during closures (Thanksgiving week, Dec 21-Jan 5)
instructions.step5: Copy to events.json and add any new 2027-specific events

recurringEvents.title: Colonial Independence Day
recurringEvents.description: America's 250th birthday celebration at Rocky Mount. Experience colonial-era festivities, musket demonstrations, period music, and family activities. Special food and crafts.
recurringEvents.notes: July 4 is always the same calendar date; verify it falls on open day (Wed-Sat)

recurringEvents.title: First Families Reunion
recurringEvents.description: Annual homecoming for descendant families of Rocky Mount's founding families. Genealogy workshops, family stories, period-appropriate meals, and networking.
recurringEvents.notes: Typically mid-August; adjust date if August 15 doesn't fall on Wed-Sat

recurringEvents.title: Founder's Day Celebration
recurringEvents.description: Commemorating William Cobb's founding of Rocky Mount. Historical reenactments, period crafts, colonial cooking demonstrations, and educational presentations.
recurringEvents.notes: CHECK: September 20, 2027 is a Monday - may need adjustment to nearest Saturday

recurringEvents.title: Autumn Harvest Festival
recurringEvents.description: Celebrating autumn and harvest traditions. Corn maze, apple cider pressing, period games, harvest crafts, and seasonal food demonstrations.
recurringEvents.notes: Early October, adjust to nearest Saturday if needed

recurringEvents.title: Heritage Skills Series: Blacksmithing
recurringEvents.description: Learn traditional blacksmithing techniques from costumed interpreters. Hands-on demonstrations of frontier craftsmanship and tools.
recurringEvents.speaker: Master Blacksmith (TBD)
recurringEvents.notes: Recurring monthly on Saturdays during season; this is April example. May need dates adjusted.

recurringEvents.title: Heritage Skills Series: Weaving & Textiles
recurringEvents.description: Discover 18th-century textile arts. Watch weavers at traditional looms and learn about colonial clothing and household fabrics.
recurringEvents.notes: May date may vary; adjust to Saturday within first two weeks

recurringEvents.title: Heritage Skills Series: Frontier Cooking
recurringEvents.description: Experience authentic frontier cooking. Learn about colonial recipes, food preservation, and hearth cooking techniques. Sample period-appropriate food.
recurringEvents.notes: June date; adjust to Saturday if needed

onetimeEvents2026.title: Tennessee 230 Years Celebration
onetimeEvents2026.description: Special celebration of Tennessee's 230th statehood anniversary (1796-2026).
onetimeEvents2026.note: One-time event for 2026 only; do not include in recurring template

summaryFor2027.note: Add project-specific new events after filling in recurring templates

helperTable.description: Quick reference for manually checking if dates fall on open days
helperTable.process: 1. Look up date on calendar, 2. Check what day of week it is, 3. Verify it's in openDays list, 4. If not, adjust to nearest open day
